_comment: GitHub Copilot CLI PROJECT-LOCAL hook config for the daily-ai-intelligence skill.
_comment_scope: Deploy to .github/hooks/daily-ai-intelligence.json in your BRIEFING PROJECT (the repo where you run daily briefs), NOT to ~/.copilot/hooks/. Project-local scope ensures the Stop hook only fires when you are working in that project, not in unrelated sessions.
_comment_stop: agentStop fires when the main agent finishes a turn. Exit 2 from the hook prevents the agent from stopping and feeds stderr as continuation context.
